low.Label: Low
low.Title: Older Computers
low.Description: Prioritizes smoothness by disabling shadows, complex dynamic lights, fog, and map animations.

medium.Label: Medium
medium.Title: Average Computers
medium.Description: Maintains good visuals while applying background optimizations to ensure a stable tabletop experience.

high.Label: High
high.Title: Modern Computers
high.Description: Enables higher framerate limits, advanced shadows, full weather effects rendering, and soft engine limits.

ProfileDialog.Title: Performance Profile
ProfileDialog.Intro: How powerful is the computer you are playing on? Pick the option that best describes it and the graphics settings will be adjusted automatically.
ProfileDialog.Recommendation: Your average framerate over the last two minutes was {fps} FPS. Switching to the {profile} profile should make the game smoother.

GMPanel.Title: Performance Optimizer — Player Performance
GMPanel.NoUsers: There are no other users in this world.
GMPanel.SetProfileTooltip: Apply this profile on the player's client
GMPanel.UnknownTooltip: This user's current settings have not been reported yet
GMPanel.CustomTooltip: This user's settings do not match any of the standard profiles.
GMPanel.ProfileSent: The {profile} profile was applied on {user}'s client.
GMPanel.ProfileFailed: Could not apply the profile on {user}'s client.
GMPanel.DialogSent: The profile dialog was sent to {user}.
GMPanel.DialogFailed: Could not send the profile dialog to {user}.
GMPanel.DialogSentAll: The profile dialog was sent to {count} connected user(s).

Benchmark.Heading: Benchmark
Benchmark.Hint: Activate a standardized stress-test scene for every connected player, then watch their framerate live in the FPS monitor.

Monitor.Title: Benchmark FPS Monitor
Monitor.Hint: Framerate reported by each connected client while on the benchmark scene, updated every 5 seconds.
Monitor.Empty: No FPS data yet. Players report automatically while viewing the benchmark scene.

Benchmark.SceneCreated: The benchmark scene has been created.
Benchmark.Activated: The benchmark scene is now active for all players.

ProfileDefaults.Title: Profile Defaults
ProfileDefaults.Intro: Define the settings each performance profile applies when a player picks it. Changes affect every future profile application in this world.
ProfileDefaults.DsnHint: These options drive the rendering cost of the 3D dice. MSAA antialiasing needs WebGL2; clients without it automatically fall back to SMAA.
ProfileDefaults.DsnInactive: Dice So Nice is not active in this world. Its performance options will appear here, and be managed by the profiles, once it is enabled.
ProfileDefaults.ResetContent: Restore all three profiles to their default settings? Your customizations will be lost.

core.performanceMode: Overall canvas rendering preset. Higher modes enable more visual features at greater GPU cost.
core.maxFPS: Upper limit on frames drawn per second. Lower caps ease the load on the GPU and CPU and reduce heat.
core.pixelRatioResolutionScaling: Renders the canvas at the display's native pixel density for sharper visuals, at a higher GPU cost. Disable on weak hardware.
core.photosensitiveMode: Suppresses flashing and strobing effects to lower the risk of triggering photosensitive reactions.
core.mipmap: Precomputes scaled-down copies of textures for smoother, cheaper rendering when zoomed out. Uses extra video memory.
core.visionAnimation: Animates changes to token vision and fog of war. Disable to cut rendering work.
core.lightAnimation: Animates dynamic light effects such as flicker and pulse. Disable to save GPU on scenes with many lights.

dsn.imageQuality: Overall texture and rendering resolution of the 3D dice.
dsn.shadowQuality: Resolution of the shadows the dice cast. Higher settings cost more GPU.
dsn.antialiasing: Edge-smoothing technique for the dice. MSAA looks best but needs WebGL2; SMAA is a lighter fallback.
dsn.bumpMapping: Adds surface relief detail to the dice faces. Slightly higher GPU cost.
dsn.glow: Enables glow and bloom effects around emissive dice. More GPU intensive.
dsn.useHighDPI: Renders the dice at high-DPI resolution on retina displays for sharper edges, at a higher cost.
dsn.persistentDiceOutlines: Keeps outline rendering on the dice after they settle. Small ongoing rendering cost.
dsn.advancedGlass: Uses a costlier physically based material for glass and translucent dice.

GMPanel.Name: Player Performance Panel
GMPanel.Label: Open Panel
GMPanel.Hint: Review and change the performance profile of every player, resend the profile dialog, and run the benchmark.

ProfileDefaults.Name: Profile Defaults
ProfileDefaults.Label: Edit Profiles
ProfileDefaults.Hint: Customize the settings applied by the Low, Medium and High performance profiles, including Dice So Nice performance options when that module is active.

AutoFpsCheck.Name: Automatic FPS Detection
AutoFpsCheck.Hint: Periodically measure your framerate and recommend a lighter profile when the game runs consistently slow.

FpsNeverShow.Name: Mute FPS Recommendations
FpsNeverShow.Hint: Never show the low-FPS profile recommendation on this client.
